Sources.Title: Lillie Kane — Shocking Bloodwork After 3 Years Meat + Fruit Diet!

TranscriptionNotes: The official video visibly presents the original 16-page Vibrant America report as Lillie Kane's results. The report uses the name Lillie Meakim and shows collection on 10 July 2023 at 07:00.
AgeYears is her age at the draw, calculated from the date of birth and collection date shown in the report and rounded to two decimals.
Albumin was converted from g/dL to g/L by multiplying by 10.
Creatinine was converted from mg/dL to µmol/L by multiplying by 88.4.
Glucose was converted from mg/dL to mmol/L by multiplying by 0.0555.
